result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Booking.com search results page for Phuket; 1 property found; filters include “Wonderful: 9+” and “Resorts.” One visible result card: YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店 with rating 9.6.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Phuket: 1 property found”; “Wonderful: 9+”; “Resorts”; “YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店”; “Exceptional 9.6”; “Breakfast included”; “Per night $172”; “$1,034”; “6 nights, 2 adults”; “Beach Nearby”; “3,150 feet from beach”.
selected_candidate:
YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店
constraint_evidence:
- Phuket location: supported (“Phuket” in search bar/results header).
- Beach resort: not_visible (result is tagged “Resorts,” but no explicit “beach resort” label; “Beach Nearby” only).
- Guest rating above 8.5: supported (9.6 visible; also “Wonderful: 9+” filter).
- 6-night stay: supported (visible “6 nights”).
- Dates May 5, 2026: supported (search bar shows Tue, May 5 — Mon, May 11).
- Availability for stay: supported/partial (result shown with “See availability”; page says 1 property found, but actual bookability not fully confirmed).
- Resort category: supported (filter chip “Resorts”).
- Beach proximity: supported/partial (“Beach Nearby”, “3,150 feet from beach”).
- Price constraint: not_visible (no target price specified in task).
action_target:
Likely the left-side SVG icon clicked near the lower-left area of the page, possibly a filter/control icon; exact element unclear from screenshot.
success_signals:
A filter/control opens or toggles; page state changes without navigation away; if intended, results/f

task_context.task: navigate: Search for a beach resort in Phuket with a guest rating above 8.5, available for a 6-night stay from May 5, 2026.
task_context.title: Booking.com: Hotels in Phuket. Book your hotel now!

observation.title: Booking.com: Hotels in Phuket. Book your hotel now!

evidence.claim: The search was set to Phuket Town and the date range May 5, 2026 to May 11, 2026, matching the 6-night stay requirement.
After filtering, the final results page shows 1 property found with the visible result card for YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店 rated 9.6 and labeled 'Resorts'.

The visible evidence supports Phuket location, guest rating above 8.5, and resort category, but beach-resort status is not explicitly visible; the VLM marks 'Beach resort' as not_visible and only shows 'Beach Nearby' / '3,150 feet from beach'.

The trajectory does not end in a wrong page or empty/error state; it ends on a narrowed result page with a plausible candidate, but the explicit 'beach resort' hard constraint remains unverified in the available evidence.

args.expected_behavior: The agent should verify that the selected final candidate explicitly satisfies every hard constraint, including that it is a beach resort in Phuket, has a guest rating above 8.5, and is available for the specified 6-night stay from May 5, 2026.
args.actual_behavior: The agent stopped on a results page with a strong candidate (YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店, rating 9.6, resort tag, 6 nights shown) but did not obtain explicit evidence that the candidate is a beach resort; the best available evidence only shows 'Beach Nearby' and proximity to beach, which is weaker than the requested category.
args.regression_rule: For selection tasks with multiple hard constraints, do not finalize on a candidate unless every explicit qualifier is directly verified in visible evidence or through a deeper inspection of the selected result; treat category mismatches or unverified categories (e.g., 'beach resort' vs. generic 'resort' with beach proximity) as concrete failure.
